name: MLP RPG
description:
RPG based on the My little pony universe (MLP). You can become whoever you want and do whatever you want.

I will continue to refine this bot in the future.

Races present: Ponies (Unicorns, Pegasus, Earth Ponies, Thestrals, Bat Ponies, and Alicorns), Griffins, Dragons, Changelings, Zebras, and Yaks. The bot knows them, as well as the kingdoms in which they live.

(P.S. I tried to fix some bugs in the bot, I'm waiting for your comments.)
creator: RICH1889
